posts.text:
Be honest.. would you look twice?

#AIart #AIbeauty

image_prompt.prompt: Hyper-realistic AI-generated portrait of a beautiful woman, soft golden hour lighting, shallow depth of field, looking directly at camera with a subtle confident smile, flawless skin with natural texture, light freckles, flowing dark hair with warm highlights, neutral blurred background, cinematic color grading, 85mm lens aesthetic
image_prompt.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, deformed hands, extra fingers, blurry face, uncanny valley, harsh shadows, overexposed
image_prompt.style_reference: Editorial beauty photography, soft-focus portrait style

posts.notes: High-priority portrait slot. Uses question-based caption inspired by leahyunaxo's viral pattern.

posts.text:
Street style but make it AI. Which outfit would you pick, left or right?

#AIart #AIgirl

image_prompt.prompt: Split composition showing two AI-generated fashion looks side by side: left side features a woman in an oversized streetwear outfit with sneakers and bucket hat in a Tokyo alleyway; right side shows the same woman in an elegant minimalist trench coat and heels on a European cobblestone street. Both hyper-realistic, full body shot, editorial fashion photography lighting, natural daylight, clean background
image_prompt.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, deformed limbs, bad proportions, blurry, low quality, watermark
image_prompt.style_reference: Vogue street style editorial, clean fashion photography

posts.notes: Fashion slot with interactive question caption to drive replies.

posts.text:
When AI dreams of spring. This took my breath away

#AIart #digitalart

image_prompt.prompt: Ethereal AI-generated portrait of a woman surrounded by floating cherry blossom petals, soft pink and lavender color palette, dreamlike atmosphere with light particle effects, semi-transparent flowing fabric draped over shoulders, impressionist-meets-photorealistic style, bokeh light orbs in background, gentle wind effect on hair, fantasy spring garden setting
image_prompt.negative_prompt: harsh colors, dark mood, horror, gore, deformed face, bad anatomy, text, watermark
image_prompt.style_reference: Alphonse Mucha meets modern digital art, Art Nouveau floral aesthetic

posts.notes: Artistic slot leveraging spring seasonal theme.

posts.text:
POV: AI just reinvented the red carpet. Drop a fire emoji if you'd wear this to the Met Gala

#AIart #AIbeauty

image_prompt.prompt: AI-generated stunning full-length red carpet look, woman in an avant-garde couture gown with iridescent fabric that shifts between silver and holographic blue, dramatic architectural silhouette, paparazzi flash lighting, grand marble staircase background, high fashion editorial pose, ultra-detailed fabric textures, crystal and metallic embellishments
image_prompt.negative_prompt: casual clothing, low quality, blurry, deformed, bad anatomy, cartoon style, unrealistic proportions
image_prompt.style_reference: Met Gala avant-garde fashion photography, dramatic red carpet editorial

posts.notes: Slot 4 is the A/B test differentiator: only posted in variant B (4 posts/day).

reply_templates: The lighting in this is incredible, how do you get that glow effect?
This might be your best one yet. The details are unreal.
Okay wait, the expression is so lifelike. What tool did you use for this?
Obsessed with the color palette here. Giving main character energy.
This stopped my scroll. The composition is so clean.
Love how you handled the hair texture, that's always the hardest part with AI art.
The background really makes this pop. Do you do the editing in post or is that all prompt work?
Been following your work for a while and the quality jump is insane. Keep going!
